message:
fix(dashboard): refresh health data periodically with status updates

Health data was only fetched once in Init() and never refreshed,
causing stale health indicators on pane cards. Now fetchHealthCmd()
is called after each StatusUpdateMsg to keep health info current.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
